night.imp_waiting: Waiting for Imp player to submit their kill choice…
night.imp_chosen: Imp has chosen: {{name}} — ready to resolve
night.monk_waiting: Waiting for Monk player to submit their protection choice…
night.monk_chosen: Monk is protecting: {{name}} — ready to resolve
night.poisoner_waiting: Waiting for Poisoner player to submit their poison choice…
night.poisoner_chosen: Poisoner has chosen: {{name}} — ready to resolve
night.butler_waiting: Waiting for Butler player to submit their master choice…
night.ft_waiting_player: Waiting for Fortune Teller player to submit their two targets…
night.ft_poisoned_override: ☠ Poisoned — you may send false info (YES/NO).
night.ft_drunk_override: 🍺 Drunk — you may send false info (YES/NO).
night.ft_red_herring: Red herring: {{herring}} | YES if either pick is the Demon or red herring
night.info_no_outsiders: There are no Outsiders in play
night.poisoned_warning: ☠ Poisoned — ability may malfunction; consider giving false info
night.drunk_warning: 🍺 Drunk — ability may malfunction; consider giving false info
night.undertaker_no_execution: No execution today — Undertaker receives no info.

pre_steps.minion_info_desc: All Minions wake simultaneously. They open eyes, see each other, and learn which player is the Demon. Put them to sleep.
pre_steps.minion_info_skip_desc: Fewer than 7 players: Minions do not learn who the Demon is. Storyteller shakes head.
pre_steps.demon_info_desc: The Demon (Imp) wakes. Show them who the Minions are. Provide 3 good-character bluff tokens not in play. Put them to sleep.
pre_steps.demon_info_skip_desc: Fewer than 7 players: The Demon does not learn the Minions. Storyteller shakes head.
pre_steps.bluffs_label: Bluff tokens (select 3 good characters not in play):

actions.washerwoman: Wake the Washerwoman. Show two players (one is the named Townsfolk). Show that Townsfolk token.
actions.librarian: Wake the Librarian. Show two players (one is the named Outsider), or show the zero-Outsider info token.
actions.investigator: Wake the Investigator. Show two players (one is the named Minion). Show that Minion token.
actions.chef: Wake the Chef. Count adjacent evil pairs in the circle; show that many fingers.
actions.empath: Wake the Empath. Count living evil neighbours; show 0, 1, or 2 fingers.
actions.fortuneteller: Wake the Fortune Teller. They point at two players. Nod if either is the Demon or the Red Herring; shake head otherwise.
actions.undertaker: If a player was executed today: wake the Undertaker and show the executed player's character token.
actions.monk: Wake the Monk. They point at a player (not themselves) to protect.
actions.ravenkeeper: The Ravenkeeper was killed tonight: wake them. They point at any player; show that player's character token.
actions.virgin: No night action. Ability triggers during day nominations.
actions.slayer: No night action. Ability used publicly during the day.
actions.soldier: No night action. Passively protected from Demon attack.
actions.mayor: No night action. Death redirect and win condition are passive.
actions.butler: Wake the Butler. They point at a player (not themselves) to be their Master.
actions.drunk: Wake the Drunk as if they were the Townsfolk they believe they are. Give false or unreliable information.
actions.recluse: No night action. Registration as evil/Minion/Demon is decided per-check.
actions.saint: No night action. Ability triggers on execution.
actions.poisoner: Wake the Poisoner. They point at any player — that player is poisoned tonight and tomorrow.
actions.spy: Wake the Spy. Show them the open Grimoire.
actions.scarletwoman: No night action. Transforms automatically when the Demon dies with 5+ players alive.
actions.baron: No night action. Setup modifier only (+2 Outsiders).
actions.imp: Wake the Imp. They point at any player — that player dies. If they point at themselves, trigger self-kill logic.

mayor_prompt.title: Mayor ability — Imp targeted the Mayor!
mayor_prompt.description: The Mayor is alive and healthy. You may redirect the kill to another player, or let the Mayor die.

ravenkeeper_prompt.title: Ravenkeeper died tonight — choose a player to reveal
ravenkeeper_prompt.description: Wake the Ravenkeeper. They point at any player (alive or dead). Show that player's character token privately.

minion_promotion.title: Imp self-killed — choose which Minion becomes the new Imp
minion_promotion.description: No Scarlet Woman was eligible. Choose a living Minion to become the new Demon. Show them the Imp token secretly.

player.title: Blood on the Clocktower
player.demon_bluffs: Demon bluffs — safe characters to claim:
player.ravenkeeper_title: Ravenkeeper — choose a player to learn their character
player.imp_kill_title: Imp — choose who to kill tonight
player.imp_kill_desc: Point at any player. Choose yourself to star-pass (transfer Demonhood to a Minion). Choose a dead player to skip the kill.
player.monk_protect_title: Monk — choose a player to protect tonight
player.monk_protect_desc: Pick any other alive player. The Imp cannot kill them tonight (if your ability is working).
player.poisoner_title: Poisoner — choose a player to poison tonight
player.poisoner_desc: Pick any alive player. They are poisoned tonight and tomorrow day.
player.butler_desc: Pick any other alive player as your master. You may only vote YES if your master does.
player.ft_title: Fortune Teller — choose two players to check
player.ft_desc: Pick two different players. The Storyteller will nod (YES) if either is the Demon or a red herring.

home.subtitle: Lobby — choose a room to join
home.no_players: No players in this room yet.
home.fetch_error: Could not load rooms — is the server running?
